work_unit: ESE-M02: autonomous-loop.sh stale --max-iterations comment + missing per-round boundary knobs

action: Applied full ESE-M02 remediation to scripts/autonomous-loop.sh: (1) rewrote header comment to describe --max-turns + AUTONOMOUS_MAX_TURNS/AUTONOMOUS_ROUND_TIMEOUT env vars, (2) added MAX_TURNS/ROUND_TIMEOUT variable declarations, (3) refactored run_round() to conditionally pass --max-turns and wrap with timeout, (4) corrected stale inline comment at line 144. Fix lives only in the worktree branch, not in main checkout.
outcome_evidence: Commit ed12514-equivalent landed in worktree opt-autonomous-loop-shift-1783086872 and pushed to origin/auto/opt-autonomous-loop-shift-1783086872 (verified by opt-worktree.sh output showing '✓ 已 push').
